narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. AUD strength because CSM shows AUD at 100 on D1 with AUDJPY registering strong buy on both D1 and H4, the cleanest aligned signal in the dataset
2. USD mixed positioning because hot PPI supports fundamental bullishness but H4 CSM fades to 19 versus D1 at 76, creating directional confusion that suppresses clean USD longs
3. JPY weakness because USDJPY leads CADJPY at 0.91 correlation and yen bearish fundamentals align with rising US 10Y at 4.481 extending dollar-yen carry dynamics

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDJPY is the lead pair, confirmed by both D1 and H4 strong buy alignment and its 0.88 correlation with GBPJPY which is also moving higher. NZDUSD and AUDUSD correlate at 0.86 but NZD is accelerating on H4 CSM at 99 while AUD fades from 100 to 57, suggesting AUDUSD may lag NZDUSD in the next H4 move. USDCAD H4 strong buy conflicts with USD fading on CSM, so USD gains there likely reflect CAD weakness at CSM 2 rather than genuine USD demand.

REGIME

Mixed, leaning risk-on but not confirmed. VIX at 17.8 is declining but not suppressed, S&P500 up 0.58 percent supports risk appetite, and Gold at 4706 rising alongside equities signals residual haven demand that prevents a clean risk-on declaration.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. USD direction: fundamental hot PPI and news bias call USD bullish but H4 CSM fades to 19 from D1 at 76, price behavior does not confirm the fundamental narrative
2. GBP positioning: H4 CSM accelerates to 100 signaling intraday GBP strength but D1 CSM sits at 0 and GBPUSD H4 signal is sell at minus 4, momentum and signal conflict directly

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: AUDJPY up - D1 and H4 both strong buy, AUD leads CSM, JPY fundamentally weak - Conviction 8/10
Secondary: NZDJPY up - NZD H4 CSM accelerating to 99, JPY weak, D1 buy signal present - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: GBPUSD - H4 sell signal conflicts with accelerating H4 CSM creating unresolvable noise
Watch: USDJPY breaking above recent H4 highs confirms JPY weakness thesis and validates both JPY cross longs

themes.theme: US Dollar strength from hot PPI and rally momentum
Trump-Xi meeting outcome driving risk-on sentiment
Euro weakness against dollar with downside bias
British Pound strength on better-than-expected UK data
Japanese Yen weakness as dollar rally extends
Indian Rupee pressure from foreign outflows
Precious metals supported by geopolitical uncertainty
Fed dovish bets unwinding on strong data

key_observation: USD rallying on hot PPI data while Trump-Xi meeting progressing positively is supporting risk appetite. Tech strength offsetting inflation concerns. Euro and Yen weakening against resurgent dollar. GBP supported by UK economic surprise.
watch: US Retail Sales data, Trump-Xi summit conclusion, ECB rate guidance, crude oil price stability, equity market direction given record highs
